ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size entry */,
  "us_size" REAL /* Shoe size in US measurements */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* Shoe size in EU measurements */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Shoe size in UK measurements */,
  "inches" REAL /* Shoe size in inches */,
  "cm" REAL /* Shoe size in centimeters */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart to which this size belongs */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "foot_type" TEXT /* Type of foot (e.g., Narrow, Standard, Wide) */,
  "last_type" TEXT /* Type of last used in the shoe (e.g., Traditional, Slipper, Boot) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shoe_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the footwear */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the footwear (e.g. sneakers, boots) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart to which this product belongs */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was released */,
  "material" TEXT /* Primary material used in the shoe */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the shoe */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "foot_type" TEXT /* Type of foot for which the product is designed */,
  "last_type" TEXT /* Type of last used in the shoe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size related to the product */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available for the specific product size */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color of the shoe */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material of the shoe */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "fit_accuracy" TEXT /* How accurately the shoe fit (e.g., Too Small, Fits Well, Too Large) */,
  "comfort_rating" REAL /* Comfort level rating (1-5) */,
  "appearance_rating" REAL /* Appearance rating (1-5) */,
  "value_rating" REAL /* Value for money rating (1-5) */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" INTEGER /* Preferred shoe size of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* Preferred brand of the customer */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred category of shoes (e.g., Sneakers, Boots) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)
